worstFinding: shader comment calibration numbers do not reproduce: independent 1.44M-sample float64 port gives fbm max~0.891 p99~0.729, so 0.82 edge is ~p99.95 (near-unreachable, ~0.05% pixels saturate) — recalibration directionally justified (mean swirl 0.033->0.089, active pixels 26%->40%, ~4x legibility at 1 refute) but cited justification numbers embellished beyond the math, in a round themed honesty

keyEvidence.accessibility: DOI shape+fill redundant not color-only; refute counts have text twin; but 4x-more-visible undertow still animates under prefers-reduced-motion (sea ticker unconditional)
keyEvidence.performance: constants inside pre-existing u>0.001 guarded branch; calm path pixel-identical; O(1) pure curve
keyEvidence.theming: seal inks reuse verbatim palette BUT 0xb5673a exactly collides with wuzhi domain ink - on a wuzhi tower the published channel can read as domain decoration; magic constant duplicated in source+test
keyEvidence.responsive: world-space fbm resolution-independent; 8.5px seal no LOD-aware fallback at distant zoom
keyEvidence.anti-patterns: required ClaimSpec.hasDoi forces compile-time propagation; old curve fully replaced (single call site); docked: golden reaches pixi private internals via as-unknown-as; non-reproducible numbers in shader comment
keyEvidence.interaction: repairs real contradiction; 1/2/3 now distinct; docked: published-then-refuted claim's DOI vanishes entirely (spectral guard drops seal), panel is only decode
